privileged_info_summary: The task involves adding skills and resume experience to Eli Lambert, a real employee from Odoo 17's official demo dataset. Eli Lambert is defined in Odoo's bundled hr_demo.xml. The skill types (IT, Languages), individual skills (Python, Spanish), skill levels (Expert, Intermediate), and resume line types (Experience) are created synthetically by the setup_task.sh script before the task runs. The Python skill is set to Expert level (100% progress), Spanish skill to Intermediate level (50% progress), and the resume entry 'Senior Developer at TechCorp' covers employment dates from 2019-01-01 to 2023-12-31.
